nasb.text: And let endurance have its perfect result, so that you may be perfect and complete, lacking in nothing.

esv.text: And let steadfastness have its full effect, that you may be perfect and complete, lacking in nothing.

cnv.text: 但忍耐要堅持到底，使你們可以完全，毫無缺乏。

ccb.text: 你们要坚忍到底，使你们纯全、完备、毫无缺欠。

csbs.text: 但要让忍耐发挥完全的功效，好使你们成熟、完备，在任何事上都没有缺欠。
